data.title: Threat Detection Systems
data.description: Sophisticated threat detection systems to monitor and mitigate cyber threats.
data.technical_spec: AI-powered threat detection leveraging machine learning algorithms for real-time analysis.

data.title: SSL/TLS Encryption
data.description: All communications are encrypted using the latest SSL/TLS protocols.
data.technical_spec: TLS 1.3 is the preferred protocol for securing transmissions.

data.title: Invisible CAPTCHA
data.description: CAPTCHAs are used to prevent automated abuse while maintaining user experience.
data.technical_spec: ReCAPTCHA v3 provides advanced bot protection without user interaction.

data.title: Data Loss Prevention
data.description: Systems in place to detect and protect against data exfiltration.
data.technical_spec: Google Cloud DLP APIs identify and redact sensitive information using predefined patterns.

data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
data.description: Enhanced security with multiple layers of user authentication.
data.technical_spec: U2F and OTP standards are adhered to for additional security layers.
